top_signals.title: Illinois Passes $56 Billion Budget as Chicago Bears Deal Stalled
top_signals.summary: Illinois legislators early Monday morning passed a nearly $56 billion budget for the fiscal year starting July 1, aiming to ease higher health-care and housing costs while bracing for potential federal funding cuts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nvidia's entrance into the PC market gives investors another reason to own the stock
top_signals.summary: The investment case for Nvidia just got broader and stronger.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe Junk Firms Look to Cut Loan Costs in Hot Market
top_signals.summary: Borrowers are rushing to Europe’s leveraged loan market at the start of the week to reprice debt, as they seek to capitalize on favorable credit conditions to cut their margins.
